race.description: Povey Stirk Lawyers Paul Hassett Memorial Hcp
race.comment: Over half of the original entries raced on Saturday so has changed dramatically after scratchings. MR JONES (5) is backing up quickly. Fifth here two back then placed here in easier on Saturday over 1400m behind ROSEBUD LASS. First try at the mile and expected to go close again. THE BIG FREEZE (10) has placed last two runs and is building to a win. Ran on hard to finish runner-up latest and looks tough to stop again. MI MIJO (12) jumped straight to 1900m second-up and was safely held but strips fitter and looks better placed here. Drawn to feature and can improve sharply.  KIEFFER (2) is fitter for two runs back from a spell, the latest effort a sixth over 1400m here. Yet to miss the frame in five starts course and distance and among the chances.
